title: staging_tract_classifications_v0 — loose capture of one ngsTracts tract_classifications.tsv
description: Staging payload for an ngsTracts STEP_TRC_01 (or STEP_TRC_02) output. Captures columns + rows verbatim; promote to tract_classifications_v1 via the normalize_tract_classifications action once the producer's column set is stable.

step.description: Which ngsTracts step produced the TSV.
